verdict_summary: Cannot capture baseline NORMAL response — test PC Chrome is NOT logged into genspark.ai; /api/agent/ask_proxy returns 401 Unauthorized and chat input is blocked by mandatory login modal.

evidence.har_caveat: Sanitized export captured only filter-visible entries (3 tver.jp ad calls); ask_proxy 401 from Console fetch was observed live but not in exported HAR because page navigated to accounts.google.com OAuth before export completed.
evidence.devtools_console_fetch_evidence: POST https://www.genspark.ai/api/agent/ask_proxy → STATUS 401 Unauthorized (verified via DevTools Console fetch with NON-PII body 안녕하세요)
evidence.blocking_login_modal: Mandatory '로그인 또는 회원가입' modal with Google/Apple/More options — chat input completely blocked

notes: BASELINE CAPTURE FAILED due to auth requirement, NOT due to APF or pipeline issue. Cookies observed are telemetry-only (ai_user/ai_session = Application Insights, _ga/_gcl_au = Google Analytics, __stripe_mid = Stripe, ttcsid = TikTok). NO genspark session/auth token present. The 4 prior iteration FAILs likely have the same root cause — test PC genspark session has been logged-out. REMEDIATION: (1) User logs into genspark.ai on test PC once via Google/Apple OAuth (session cookies will persist), then re-issue #957. (2) Alternatively inject existing auth cookies. Endpoint shape and request body shape ARE confirmed and match expected — only the SSE response body schema (type discriminant, content path, chunks_count, terminator) remains unknown without authenticated capture.
